---
title: "Olympics Wrangling"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

### Wrangling

HERE IS SOME STUFF

```{r}
# read in the data here
```

Here is another test.

```{r}
# Test comment
```

```{r}
# Read in the All olympic mdalists data
library(tidyverse)
athletes <- vroom::vroom('all_athletes.csv')
```

```{r}
# Selecting Columns from athletes
athletes <- athletes %>%
  select(-c(id, height, weight, team, city))
```
